arts.ttl: Liverpool flop reveals he is 'considering retirement' at 31 after failing to find a new club for the season
arts.sum: A former Liverpool star is considering hanging up his boots aged 31 after failing to find a new club. 'I don't think it would hit me that hard because I've already been going through this process,' he said.

arts.ttl: What Liverpool need to qualify for Champions League knockout stages as Real Madrid reality clear
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Arne Slot's team prepares to face Real Madrid in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Real Madrid: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Aston Villa v Juventus | Email Michael With Vini Jr injured at Leganés, Mbappé switched to his preferred position on the left and the Frenchman will almost certainly occupy the same position this evening. Here’s Sid Lowe to explain a little more. “If ever a game needed a moniker Clash of the Titans, this would be it,” emails krishnamoorthy. “Real have not been winning of late, it is difficult even to type this statement, which is absurd. The losing streak had to end and what better platform to perform than in the tournament that they own. But then we thought the same about City last night. Real is no City and Liverpool is certainly no Feynoord. I expect a 2-2 draw”. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: I don't agree with Jamie Carragher - there's a bigger unbelievable Mohamed Salah Liverpool contract issue
arts.sum: Speaking to the ECHO, Ally McCoist said he ultimately disagrees with Jamie Carragher's criticism of Mohamed Salah regarding his recent contract comments.

arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly join the race for one of Europe's most in-demand midfielders, valued at €60m, ahead of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool hopes of European progress hang in balance after Real Madrid blow
arts.sum: Liverpool slipped to narrow defeat in UEFA Youth League against Real Madrid at Kirkby on Wednesday afternoon
